name: DOMINION ENERGY, INC
summary: Dominion Energy, Inc. is a regulated energy company providing electric generation, transmission, and distribution services, as well as natural gas distribution services. The company operates through subsidiaries including Virginia Power, participates in PJM energy markets, and is developing offshore wind energy projects such as the CVOW Commercial Project, serving industrial, commercial, and residential customers.

products.name: Electric Generation
products.description: Production of electricity through regulated and nonregulated generation facilities including nuclear and offshore wind.

products.name: Electric Transmission and Distribution
products.description: Regulated transmission and distribution of electricity to customers in service territories.

products.name: Gas Distribution
products.description: Regulated natural gas distribution services provided to customers by Dominion Energy.

products.name: CVOW Commercial Project
products.description: Offshore wind energy construction project developed with Stonepeak as a noncontrolling interest partner.

partnerships.description: Noncontrolling interest partner in the CVOW Commercial Project offshore wind development.
Virginia Power is a member and participant in the PJM regional transmission organization.
